intro.title: AI Virtual Receptionist for Beauty Therapists

blocks.heading: A Seamless Experience for You and Your Clients
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, our AI Virtual Receptionist is designed to make running your beauty business smoother and more efficient. Whether you manage a busy salon, spa, or boutique beauty studio, our AI handles calls, books appointments, and answers client questions — all while reflecting your brand's professional and friendly tone.

blocks.heading: Focus on Treatments, Not the Phone
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist takes care of booking and managing appointments so you can focus on your clients. It can answer questions like 'Do you offer lash lifts?', 'Can I book a spray tan and facial together?', or 'What's your cancellation policy?' instantly and accurately. It also sends reminders, reschedules appointments, and follows up after visits — keeping your schedule full and your clients happy.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Client or Booking Again
blocks.description: Whether you're with a client, in the middle of a treatment, or your salon is closed, your AI Receptionist answers every call and inquiry immediately. It provides details about your services — from facials and waxing to massages and nail treatments — and confirms bookings in real time. You'll never lose a client due to a missed call or unanswered message again.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Enhance your beauty practice with intelligent automation that reduces admin work, streamlines client care, and boosts efficiency.

cards.title: Streamlined Appointment Management
cards.description: Books, reschedules, and confirms appointments automatically, helping reduce no-shows.

cards.title: Fully Customizable to Your Business
cards.description: Your AI Receptionist can be trained specifically to your business requirements — matching your tone, services, and client experience.

cards.title: Affordable 24/7 Coverage
cards.description: Operate like a full-time reception team at a fraction of the cost.

cards.title: Improved Client Experience
cards.description: Responds instantly and professionally, ensuring your clients always feel valued and cared for.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Beauty Therapists Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by beauty salons and spas across Australia for its reliability, warmth, and customization. It integrates seamlessly with your booking system, handles calls professionally, and maintains your salon's polished image. Best of all, your AI Receptionist can be trained to your specific business needs — reflecting your brand's tone, workflow, and client journey from the very first interaction. Let our AI manage your admin while you focus on creating beautiful results for your clients.

card.heading: Simplify Client Notes and Follow-Ups
card.description: After each appointment, you or your team can record quick voice memos — which are automatically transcribed and summarized for easy reference. You can also upload treatment notes, product preferences, and client feedback, all stored securely in one dashboard. This helps you personalize future visits and deliver the perfect experience every time.
